meaning: adj.[语]正字法的,拼字正确的
examples: The viewport size of the Camera when set to Orthographic.
The images were re-projected into an orthographic map projection.
They see the word and there's some kind of an orthographic representation.
While this might be someone's first outing in the orthographic Super Bowl, it takes many rounds -- from school bees to local to regional -- to qualify for the National Spelling Bee.
